title: vadocs Shared Governance Config
description: Validates .vadocs/conf.json — the hub config defining shared vocabulary for all governed document types.

$comment.description: File-level documentation (array of strings for readability)

field_registry.description: Every governed frontmatter field defined once. Fields are the atoms; blocks compose them; types compose blocks.

blocks.description: Composable groups of fields (DITA specialization principle). Types compose blocks additively.

additionalProperties.description: List of field names from field_registry

types.description: Document type registry — which blocks each type composes plus type-specific fields.

tags.description: Shared tag vocabulary for all governed documents. Alphabetical order. Each tag has a description defining its scope.

date_format.description: Regex pattern for ISO 8601 date validation (YYYY-MM-DD)

description.description: What this field represents and how to use it

maintenance.description: Who maintains this field: human (author sets), auto (hook maintains), human+auto (human bumps, hook validates)

myst_native.description: true = top-level YAML key rendered by MyST site; false = lives under options.*, invisible to MyST

blocks.description: Block names from the blocks section

description.description: Scope definition — use this to decide which tag fits a document

authors_item.description: Author object per MyST spec. Ecosystem minimum: name + email.
